title: GTCO/Lagos International Polo Tournament Returns for 2025 Edition - FinancialEDGE

html:
The Lagos Polo Club has announced the return of the GTCO/Lagos International Polo Tournament for its 2025 edition.

At a media briefing held at the Lagos Polo Club on Tuesday, representatives of the Lagos Polo Club and Guaranty Trust Holding Company (GTCO) PLC revealed plans for the upcoming tournament.

The GTCO/Lagos International Polo Tournament is one of the most prestigious polo events in Africa, attracting top polo players from around the world.

The 2025 edition promises to be an exciting one, with a lineup of thrilling matches and activities.

The tournament is scheduled to take place at the Lagos Polo Club, with the exact dates to be announced soon.

GTCO PLC has been a long-time supporter of the Lagos Polo Club and the sport of polo in Nigeria, and this year’s tournament is expected to be another spectacular event.

 

:L-R : Mohammed Sani Dangote ,Captain, Lagos Polo Club;Unoaku Sheidu,Corporate Communication, GTCO PLC ; Olugbile Holloway ,Secretary Lagos Polo Club; Derin Alex-Adedipe ,Corporate  Communication, GTCO PLC ; Adeyemi Alakija ,Secretary General Nigeria Polo Association; Mayowa Ogunusi,Tournament Manager ,Lagos Polo Club, at the media briefing on the 2025 edition of GTCO/Lagos International Polo Tournament ,which was held at the Lagos Polo Club…on Tuesday..
